notes: Agent rollouts executed successfully on tau-bench via AgentGymEnv with prompt-based tool calling. Spans were collected per rollout. However, VERL training pipeline could not form training batches because LlmProxyTraceToTriplet requires prompt/response token IDs in specific span attributes that the LiteLLM proxy does not populate for multi-turn tool-calling conversations. VERL was designed for single-turn text generation RL; multi-turn tool-calling agents require deeper proxy integration to capture per-turn token IDs.
